_comment: Single source of truth for Claude model metadata. The orchestrator's price math, the renderer's Settings dropdown, and the GET /api/models/catalog route all read this file. To add a model, add an entry below — nothing else needs to change. JSON (not YAML) so the catalog ships in the lite installer bundle without pulling PyYAML into requirements.txt.

_schema.id: the full Anthropic model id (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6') — what the API expects
_schema.family: 'opus' | 'sonnet' | 'haiku' — used for substring fallback when id lookup misses
_schema.display_name: what the renderer shows in dropdowns
_schema.context_window_tokens: max context window the API will accept
_schema.vision: true if the model accepts image content blocks
_schema.available_via: ['claude_api'] — kept as a list so future entries can declare 'local_bundled' or 'local_byo'

family_fallback_prices._comment: Used by ModelCatalog.prices_for_model() when an id is not in the catalog but matches a family substring. Mirrors the orchestrator's pre-catalog _DEFAULT_MODEL_PRICES so unknown models don't silently get the wrong family's prices.
